docstrings.OffsiteMiddleware: A Scrapy middleware to filter offsite requests based on allowed domains.
docstrings.OffsiteMiddleware.from_crawler: Factory method to create the middleware instance from the crawler object.
docstrings.OffsiteMiddleware.process_request: Processes the request and raises IgnoreRequest if it is an offsite link not allowed by the spider.
docstrings.OffsiteMiddleware.request_scheduled: Handles the request_scheduled signal for the given request and spider.
docstrings.OffsiteMiddleware.should_follow: Determines if the request should be followed based on the host and spider configuration.
docstrings.OffsiteMiddleware.spider_opened: Initializes the host regex when the spider is opened.
